name: Rubén Blades
abstract: Rubén Blades Bellido de Luna (born 16 July 1948), known professionally as Rubén Blades (Spanish: [ruˈβem ˈblaðes], but [- ˈblei̯ðs] in Panama and within the family), is a Panamanian musician, singer, composer, actor, activist, and politician, performing musically most often in the salsa, and Latin jazz genres. As a songwriter, Blades bro…

works_created.t: El Padre Antonio y el Monaguillo Andrés

about_quotes.speaker: Tom Malone
about_quotes.evidence: I played on all the salsa recordings in New York too. Fania Records, 1974, ’75, ’76. Willie Colon, Hector Lavoe, Ruben Blades... All those guys.
about_quotes.doc_title: Tom Malone interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 3, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Victor Rendon
about_quotes.evidence: I have a bass player that played with Tito Puente for many years and he played with Rubén Blades, I don’t know if you know that particular name.
about_quotes.doc_title: Victor Rendon interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, November 15, 2019 [interview 1 of 2]
